messages.content:
do the same for these difficulty definitions:  
```  
DIFFICULTY_DEF_DICT = {
"初级": "题目要求模型对任务类别有基础的理解，并能够根据简单的提示生成合理的回答。模型只需掌握任务类别的基础知识即可完成任务。",
"中级": "题目要求模型对任务类别有一定深度的理解，并结合多个信息点进行分析或推理。生成的回答需要具备一定的逻辑性和层次感，模型需要掌握任务类别的背景知识才能生成较为完整的答案。",
"高级": "题目涉及任务类别的复杂概念，需要模型进行深入的推理、创造性生成或对复杂信息的整合。生成合理的回答要求模型具备较高的理解能力，并能够灵活运用任务类别相关知识。",
"专家级": "题目涉及任务类别极其复杂的概念，要求模型进行高度复杂的推理和创造性生成。题目可能需要模型具备深入的专业知识以及极强的分析和综合能力，才能产生准确且高质量的回答。",
"大师级": "题目要求模型具备该领域的权威级别知识，并能够在极复杂的情境下进行推理和创新。模型需要具备超高的洞察力和创造性，才能产生精确且具有深度的回答，通常涉及跨领域的整合与创新性思考。",
}  
```

```python
DIFFICULTY_DEF_DICT = {
    "Beginner": "The task requires the model to have a basic understanding of the task category and generate reasonable responses based on simple prompts. The model only needs foundational knowledge of the task category to complete the task.",
    "Intermediate": "The task requires the model to have a certain depth of understanding of the task category and analyze or reason by combining multiple pieces of information. The generated response needs to exhibit some level of logical consistency and structure. The model must have background knowledge of the task category to produce a relatively complete answer.",
    "Advanced": "The task involves complex concepts within the task category, requiring the model to perform in-depth reasoning, creative generation, or integration of complex information. Generating reasonable responses demands the model to have a high level of comprehension and the ability to flexibly apply knowledge related to the task category.",
    "Expert": "The task involves highly complex concepts within the task category and requires the model to conduct highly sophisticated reasoning and creative generation. The task may necessitate the model to possess deep professional knowledge and strong analytical and integrative abilities to produce accurate and high-quality responses.",
    "Master": "The task demands the model to possess authoritative-level expertise in the field and perform reasoning and innovation in extremely complex scenarios. The model needs to demonstrate exceptional insight and creativity to produce precise and profound responses, often requiring cross-disciplinary integration and innovative thinking.",
}
```
